name: Easter Unicorn Rope Basket Pink - Spritz™
description:
Add a touch of whimsy to your space with the Easter Unicorn Rope Basket Pink - Spritz™. Crafted from a soft plush construction, this charming pink basket is perfect for organizing your essentials. Its round shape and convenient handles make it easy to move around, while the delightful unicorn design adds a playful element to your Easter or spring decor. Ideal for universal placement, it measures 8 inches in height and 9.5 inches in both width and depth.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
